typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   row_id   ,hosp_patient_nbr   ,phn   ,phn_clean   ,name_first_middle   ,1 as first_name_score   ,1 as dupe_count    ,name_first     ,name_last   ,1 as last_name_score   ,name_first_middle_clean   ,name_last_clean   ,birth_date   ,gender   ,aka_name   ,1 as row_score   ,julian_month   ,patient_nbr     ,street_addr1   ,street_addr2   ,city   ,province   ,postal_code   ,phone_number   ,data_source   ,130005 as stage_id   ,row_id as master_row_id   ,phn as master_phn   ,name_first_middle as master_name_first_middle   ,name_last as master_name_last   ,birth_date as master_birth_date   ,gender as master_gender   ,street_addr1 as master_street_addr1   ,street_addr2 as master_street_addr2   ,city as master_city   ,province as master_province   ,postal_code as master_postal_code   ,phone_number as master_phone_number   ,data_source as master_data_source     ,\'A\' as match_code FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2]    where mark is null   UNION ALL   SELECT   A.row_id   ,A.hosp_patient_nbr   ,A.phn   ,A.phn_clean   ,A.name_first_middle   ,1 as firs_name_score   ,1 dupe_count   ,A.name_first   ,A.name_last   ,1 as last_name_score   ,A.name_first_middle_clean   ,A.name_last_clean   ,A.birth_date   ,A.gender   ,A.aka_name   ,1 as row_score   ,A.julian_month   ,A.patient_nbr   ,A.street_addr1   ,A.street_addr2   ,A.city   ,A.province   ,A.postal_code   ,A.phone_number   ,A.data_source   ,130005 as stage_id   ,A.master_row_id   ,D.master_phn   ,D.master_name_first_middle   ,D.master_name_last   ,D.master_birth_date   ,D.master_gender   ,D.master_street_addr1   ,D.master_street_addr2   ,D.master_city   ,D.master_province   ,D.master_postal_code   ,D.master_phone_number   ,D.master_data_source    ,\'B\' as match_code FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] A   INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT 	  B.row_id 	  ,C.name_first_middle as master_name_first_middle 	  ,C.name_last as master_name_last 	  ,C.gender as master_gender 	  ,C.birth_date as master_birth_date 	  ,C.street_addr1 as master_street_addr1 	  ,C.street_addr2 as master_street_addr2 	  ,C.city as master_city 	  ,C.province as master_province 	  ,C.postal_code as master_postal_Code 	  ,C.phone_number as master_phone_number 	  ,C.data_source as master_data_source 	  ,C.phn as master_phn 	FROM 	[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] B 	  INNER JOIN  	[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] C 	 ON  C.row_id=B.master_row_id 	 WHERE  B.[mark]=1) D 	 ON A.row_id=D.row_id WHERE  A.[mark]=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptmasterstg1
srcptmasterstg1 sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		match_code as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_first as string,
		name_last_clean as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_province as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		master_city as string,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		phone_number as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		last_name_score,
		match_code,
		master_data_source,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		master_postal_code,
		master_birth_date,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		master_phone_number,
		patient_nbr,
		name_first,
		name_last_clean,
		master_name_first_middle,
		master_phn,
		master_province,
		stage_id,
		master_gender,
		first_name_score,
		master_city,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		master_row_id,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		master_street_addr2,
		phone_number,
		master_street_addr1,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle)) ~> destptmasterstg1
